roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X: DIANA HOAG APPEARS WITH CHRISTOPHER GARCIA FROMTHE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/X: THE PEOPLE FILE A MOTION TO DETAIN/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 08-02-21 (10TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALLINSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2: THE INTERSECTION OF EDDY AND POLK STREET, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: 07-28-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
